title: erigeron microcephalus
intro: Erigeron microcephalus, also known as the dwarf fleabane or smallflower fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Erigeron microcephalus include its ability to aid in the healing of minor cuts and scrapes, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Erigeron microcephalus often involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
